title: Razor 16x
description: A 16x PvP Pack for 1.8.9 and Modern Minecraft
body:
Click [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/razor-16x-pvp-pack-bedrock-edition/) to download the Bedrock Version!\
Razor 16x is a PvP texture pack, helping you in PvP fights using things like short swords, low fire, etc.\
It has no performance impact, so you don't need to worry about having a laggy bedwars game.\
It also comes with a 1.8.9 version!\
Features:
- Low fire
- Short swords
- Retextures tools
- Low shield
- Low totem
- Ore borders (works with all resource packs!
- Tweaked bow
- Tweaked apple
- Better crosshair, for precision and performance
- And more!

Enjoy!
